valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Fri 26 Jun 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Sat 27 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Low Shannon 1009 expected Hebrides 1001 by 0600 tomorrow. Low FitzRoy 1009 losing its identity by same time
